finding: ALLOS turned consumer data into a sellable product ("Store Insights") + proprietary "Projeto Bahia" AI at scale (58 malls)

finding: BB reports 800+ AI models/agents live and published first Brazilian bank ethical AI guidelines (with IBM/EY)

finding: Porto Seguro auto-releases 85% of claims via AI and reports 29% fewer customer contacts; proprietary "GenIAl" model

finding: Petrobras' own agency discloses genAI for 100k+ employees (Azure OpenAI) + a first-of-its-kind AI for debtor-asset recovery

finding: Raízen reports R$58M saved via AI predictive maintenance on cane harvesters

finding: Vibra reports R$900M fuel-inventory reduction via AI predictive management since 2023

finding: Ping An "AI in All" strategy — vertical domain LLMs across finance & healthcare rather than generic apps; 2024 annual report ~29-39 AI mentions, 17+ "large model" mentions

finding: CATL "extreme manufacturing" — AI defect detection with 200+ defect categories; all 3 global lithium-ion "lighthouse factories" are CATL's; ~1 cell/sec with 100+ inspection steps

finding: Sany runs 33 "lighthouse factories" (2 are the only WEF-certified heavy-equipment plants globally); deployed local DeepSeek for enterprise AI

finding: Baosteel deployed blast-furnace AI large model + ~300 scenarios, targeting 1,000 scenario models in 3yrs; claims >100M yuan/yr economic gains; won WAIC SAIL award

finding: CSPC's AI-designed molecule platform underpinned a $110M-upfront / up-to-$5.22bn AstraZeneca deal — "largest AI-pharma contract in China in recent years"

finding: Adidas GenAI chatbot claims ~92% cost reduction analyzing 2M+ reviews — vendor (Databricks) case study

finding: BMW CIO states AI will "support every process" within a few years but explicitly evaluates use cases by ROI — disciplined framing vs hype

finding: Brenntag positions itself as first German company to run autonomous AI agents on Salesforce — early agentic-AI production claim

finding: Zalando explicitly attributes record revenue/efficiency and Q1 2026 growth to AI in its own investor results

finding: Vonovia's AI story is mostly a consumer survey + concept for elderly-living infrastructure — weakest primary deployment evidence in the DAX40 set

finding: Amadeus reports generative-AI adoption in Spanish travel sector reached ~24% in 2025 (their research)

finding: Acciona created a dedicated AI department and named an AI director (Sept 2025) — org-level AI commitment

finding: BBVA is one of the largest enterprise ChatGPT deployments globally (120k+ seats); OpenAI published a joint case study

finding: AENA finalizing plan to deploy AI across all 46 airports + 2 helipads

finding: Grifols claims AI on its plasma sample repository could predict Parkinson's 12 years in advance

finding: Inditex CEO frames AI as the company's next major growth lever beyond fashion

finding: Mapfre says AI touches ~80% of its Spanish customer base (6M clients); built end-to-end claims agent on WhatsApp in 100 days

finding: Airbus reports EUR 1.5M savings from AI planning optimization on A330/A350 — but figure comes from vendor (videns.ai), not Airbus

finding: Bouygues Telecom claims genAI/agentic CRM pilots "double efficiency" of customer relations
why_it_matters: Concrete productivity claim in live customer-facing deployment

finding: BNP Paribas targets EUR 500M value from AI by 2025, rising to EUR 750M and 800 production use cases by end-2026 — one of the largest quantified AI value ambitions in CAC40

finding: AXA "NADIA" program targets 400 data/AI use cases with ~2,000 AI experts and full cloudification by 2026

finding: Capgemini attributes Q1 2026 +11% revenue growth to AI; but La Revue du Digital notes market unconvinced by agentic-AI pivot (no share improvement)

finding: ArcelorMittal Brazil $10.5M margin impact from AI sales — sourced from McKinsey (consultant/vendor), not company filing

finding: LVMH's MaIA genAI assistant handles ~2M queries/month across 40,000 employees and 75+ Maisons — one of the largest disclosed internal genAI user bases in French luxury

finding: L'Oréal runs a named proprietary GenAI platform "CREAITECH" on NVIDIA AI Enterprise for 3D marketing content, plus flagship OpenAI + NVIDIA partnerships — among the most concrete first-party GenAI deployments in CAC40

finding: Renault reportedly generated EUR 400M in savings from AI since 2023 via factory/industrial-metaverse deployment (Re-Industry 2027)

finding: EssilorLuxottica + Meta launched "Meta Glasses" AI eyewear (June 2026) with real-time Meta AI computer vision, positioned as a new consumer tech category

finding: Publicis framed by market as a potential "AI loser" (ad agency disruption) but H1 2026 results contradict this - Capital headline "the condemned is doing well"

finding: Stellantis partners with Mistral AI (French sovereign LLM) for enterprise-wide AI, alongside Microsoft (100+ initiatives) and Accenture+NVIDIA - multi-vendor AI at scale

finding: Teleperformance shares plunged on the Paris Bourse over fears AI virtual assistants disrupt its call-center model - the clearest CAC40 case of AI seen as an existential threat to the core business

finding: Apollo Hospitals claims 12 advanced clinical AI applications in production incl. risk-scoring to reduce hospitalisations & critical-care decision support; partnerships with Roche & Microsoft

finding: Axis Bank targets 10% P&L impact from GenAI by FY29 and cites 18-24 month horizon for "major impact" — aspirational, not realised

finding: Airtel's AI spam-detection processes 1 trillion records/day and flags ~100M spam calls daily — free, network-level, no user opt-in

finding: Eternal (Zomato) built Nugget as internal customer-support AI then productised it for external sale — a use-turned-product pattern; deep OpenAI partnership across Zomato/Blinkit/Hyperpure

finding: HCLTech AI Force is chiefly a product sold to clients; the firm's own "internal use" for employee productivity is asserted by the chairperson but lacks named deployment/numbers — classic IT-services sell-vs-use ambiguity

finding: IndiGo's 6Eskai chatbot reportedly handles 92% of customer queries autonomously and generated >$12M revenue — one of the most concrete revenue+deflection numbers of any Indian consumer AI deployment

finding: L&T rolled Microsoft Copilot to 140,000 employees — one of India's largest enterprise GenAI seat deployments by headcount

finding: Reliance announced ~$110B AI investment plan and gigawatt-scale AI data centres at Jamnagar (120MW+ online 2026) plus Jio Brain platform — infrastructure scale rather than proven internal ROI

finding: SBI Life underwriting AI claims cut per-application processing "from hours to 45 seconds"; Sarvam AI (Indian LLM startup) WhatsApp bot rolled to 350k+ agents

finding: Tata Motors PV reports ~80 ML models in production and 350 AI pilots with 30-40% infra cost reduction — one of the clearest "pilots-to-production" counts from an Indian manufacturer

finding: Tata Steel says it built 550+ AI models over 5-6 years for output/quality — the highest production-model count disclosed by any Indian company in this sweep

finding: Trent (Westside) claims an AI design suite lifted designer output from ~50 to 400-500 designs/week (8-10x) — a rare, concrete productivity multiple in fashion retail

finding: Godrej Consumer's AI demand forecasting reportedly reached >75% accuracy and shelf image-recognition spans 1M outlets/600k villages; launched "Amethyst" agentic AI engine

finding: A2A runs "Factory AI" hub coordinating 150+ AI projects internally; Chief Innovation/AI/R&D Officer role exists

finding: BPER reportedly plans ~2,000 roles to be replaced/reallocated via AI to cut costs

finding: Cucinelli published "Human and Artificial Intelligence" manifesto + brunellocucinelli.ai site; explicitly ethics/humanism-framed AI positioning

finding: Campari AI signals are largely vendor case studies (Microsoft, Bynder, Wegrow) — sell-side marketing; Wegrow claims 6,743 hrs + €280k saved but no Campari primary confirmation

finding: Eni claims world's #1 corporate computing power (HPC6+HPC7 >1 Exaflop/s, #6 in global TOP500) dedicated to AI/HPC for energy R&D

finding: Unipol+IBM watsonx claim: ~90% reduction in claims event handling time (vendor case study — treat as self/vendor-claimed, not audited)

finding: Nintendo deliberately abstains from generative AI (President Furukawa 2026): IP-protection + power-consumption concerns

finding: Recruit ~1,300 Indeed/Glassdoor layoffs attributed to AI restructuring

finding: Keyence RPA deployment failure documented

finding: ENEOS world-first AI autonomous crude-distillation unit, ~40% human-intervention reduction (self-claimed)

finding: Sberbank/Gref pushing "autonomous AI-agent economy" narrative at WAIC 2026; claims AI will handle up to 80% of routine work and half of mid/large-business deals will go autonomous — forward-looking claims, not realized results.

finding: Alrosa reports a rare CONCRETE, quantified result: +11% mine-truck loading efficiency from machine vision at Udachny mine — self-claimed but specific, logged in TADviser deployment catalog.

finding: MMK: regional governor cites 95 digitalization projects, 51 using AI, at the Magnitogorsk steel plant; won national "Priority: Digital 2026" award in two categories. Volume signal but no economic metrics.

finding: Moscow Exchange market-manipulation/insider-trading detection AI generated a ~6-outlet syndication burst from one press release (dedupe). Genuine surveillance deployment, not hype.

finding: PIK reports concrete productivity metric: internal doc/instruction search time cut from 30 min to 5 min via AI (TADviser deployment catalog).

finding: Rostelecom AI traffic lights in Salekhard: +25% throughput and 1.3M RUB fuel savings — concrete public-sector deployment metric.

finding: Rusal AI eco-monitoring of electrolysis carries a stated 1.6bn RUB project budget (TASS) — spend figure, not a return figure.

finding: Yandex discloses a rare REVENUE figure: >2bn RUB from monetizing Alice AI chats in 2025 (RBC) — actual top-line, not a projection or cost.

finding: Admiral reported 71% rise in fraud in 2025, partly attributed to AI-manipulated evidence (deepfake images)

finding: AstraZeneca CEO Pascal Soriot publicly states AI is reshaping drug development, boosting clinical-trial success odds — CEO-level primary attribution, rare

finding: Anglo American 2025 annual report: "AI is particularly well suited to drive our strategic priority of operational excellence" + formal AI Centre of Excellence

finding: British Gas (Centrica) cutting ~500 call-centre jobs, unions attribute to AI automation in customer service

finding: Diageo AI-driven "Accelerate" program targets $312m savings; internal GenAI agent "DANI" rolled out group-wide

finding: Entain ARC player-protection AI: +98% uptake — AI used for regulatory/safer-gambling not just revenue

finding: 3M CEO Bill Brown framing AI as core to turnaround/operations optimization

finding: Accenture reports $2.7B GenAI revenue FY25 (tripled YoY) + $5.9B GenAI bookings, 6,000 active AI projects — one of the largest self-reported GenAI revenue figures in S&P 500

finding: Allstate uses OpenAI GPT to draft ~50,000 claims communications/day across ~23,000 reps — "almost all" claimant comms AI-written; WSJ notes AI rated more empathetic than human reps

finding: Constellation restarting Three Mile Island Unit 1 (Crane Clean Energy Center) on a 20-yr PPA solely to power Microsoft AI data centers — emblematic of AI's nuclear-power pull
why_it_matters: AI compute demand reviving retired nuclear capacity

finding: CVS/Aetna facing investigation over alleged AI use to screen/deny Medicare prior-authorization requests at scale — recurring health-insurer AI accountability theme
why_it_matters: AI in coverage denials drawing regulatory/legal scrutiny

finding: John Deere See & Spray AI vision deployed across 5M+ acres in 2025 with ~50% herbicide reduction — one of the largest quantified real-world agricultural AI deployments
why_it_matters: Large acreage + input-reduction number = measurable AI ROI in the field

finding: Delta's AI dynamic pricing (Fetcherr) scaling to ~20% of fares triggered Congressional inquiries over "personalized" airfare pricing; Delta issued a public rebuttal denying use of personal data
why_it_matters: AI pricing under political/regulatory scrutiny; consumer-fairness flashpoint

finding: Dow announced ~4,500 job cuts while shifting emphasis toward AI and automation — explicit AI/automation-linked workforce reduction at a major chemical maker
why_it_matters: Concrete AI-associated layoff figure (labor tradeoff)

finding: EA CEO Andrew Wilson says ~60% of game development processes could be impacted by generative AI; Stability AI partnership — but reporting notes "stark divide" internally and across the industry over GenAI in games
why_it_matters: Large self-claimed AI-impact % + creative-workforce tension signal

finding: GE HealthCare tops the FDA's AI-enabled medical device authorization list for 4 consecutive years (~100 authorizations) — radiology dominates FDA AI clearances (68 new in Q1 2026 alone)
why_it_matters: Regulator-validated AI at scale; radiology is the most FDA-cleared AI domain

finding: HCA's SPOT AI sepsis-prediction system credited with saving ~8,000 lives by detecting sepsis ~18 hours earlier than clinicians — a rare clinical-outcome (lives) metric tied to a deployed AI
why_it_matters: Life-saving outcome metric, not just efficiency — strongest clinical AI value signal so far

finding: J&J pivoted from testing ~900 generative AI use cases to prioritizing high-impact ones (drug discovery, supply chain) — another candid signal that most enterprise GenAI pilots don't scale
why_it_matters: Reinforces the pilot-sprawl vs focused-value pattern (cf. Carnival)

finding: Ticketmaster (Live Nation) laid off ~350 workers amid an "AI shift"/restructuring despite record revenue — AI-linked workforce reduction
why_it_matters: Concrete AI-associated layoff figure

finding: Microsoft AI business hit ~$37B annual run rate (Q3 FY26, +123% YoY); Copilot 100M+ users — but one source flags Copilot enterprise adoption "lags at 3.3%", a notable adoption-vs-hype tension
why_it_matters: Huge AI revenue alongside reports of modest Copilot seat penetration

finding: Nasdaq's "Dynamic M-ELO" is the first SEC-approved AI-powered order type — a rare instance of a regulator explicitly clearing AI inside live market microstructure
why_it_matters: Regulatory approval of AI in core exchange trading mechanics

finding: Take-Two CEO Zelnick: embraces GenAI operationally ("hundreds of pilots") but insists AI can't create a blockbuster (no GenAI in GTA 6); company reportedly laid off its dedicated AI team — a notably measured, human-creative-first stance
why_it_matters: Counter-hype: flagship creative work deliberately kept AI-free
